reforms.description: The Government is taking initiatives to promote innovative activities in Canada, including support for the development of environmental technologies, the establishment of new industrial-policy programmes, and measures to reform the unemployment-insurance system, enhance job training, and support small businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to enhance technological innovation and support small businesses, which are key drivers of economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiatives have been actively implemented as part of the government's strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant overhaul of the support mechanisms for innovation and small businesses.
reforms.source_quote: The new Government has already taken measures to reform the unemployment-insurance system, enhance job training, support small businesses, and promote technological innovation.

reforms.description: The Canadian Investment Fund will work with private partners and the financial sector to identify the best way to provide long-term capital to innovative companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing long-term capital to innovative companies is essential for fostering their growth and enhancing overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is more focused and does not represent a system-wide change.
reforms.source_quote: The Canadian Investment Fund will work with private partners and the financial sector to identify the best way to provide long-term capital to innovative companies.
